strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js
Strong background in AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Demonstrated expertise in optimizing systems for scalability and performance (e.g., low-latency apps, Kubernetes deployments)
concerns: Limited direct experience with the primary stack (Nest.js, Vitest) compared to other technologies (e.g., Dlang, Ember.js)
Inconsistent tenure in roles (frequent job changes, some short tenures)
Secondary stack mentions Kotlin/Java but lacks depth in enterprise-grade backend development (e.g., Spring, microservices)
response.justification: Aisha has 11+ years of full-stack development experience with a strong focus on JavaScript/TypeScript and React, along with recent work in AI agent infrastructure. Her diverse background includes scalable systems, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (AWS), but her tenure in roles is inconsistent, and her direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest is unclear. She meets the core requirements but may require additional assessment on primary stack proficiency.
